{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01GyvRrHFMNkmGTjqVF7hnfN","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function PATCH(\n     7→  req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const body = await req.json();\n    34→  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n    35→\n    36→  if (!applicationId || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n    39→      { status: 400 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n    44→  const application = db\n    45→    .prepare(\n    46→      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    47→    )\n    48→    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    49→\n    50→  if (!application) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n    53→      { status: 404 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n    58→\n    59→  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    60→    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    61→    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    62→      // Check if group is already full\n    63→      const { count } = db\n    64→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    65→        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n    66→\n    67→      if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    68→        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n    69→      }\n    70→\n    71→      // Update application status\n    72→      db.prepare(\n    73→        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    74→      ).run(applicationId);\n    75→\n    76→      // Add to members\n    77→      db.prepare(\n    78→        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    79→      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n    80→\n    81→      // Check if group is now full\n    82→      const newCount = count + 1;\n    83→      if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    84→        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    85→        return { isFull: true };\n    86→      }\n    87→      return { isFull: false };\n    88→    });\n    89→\n    90→    try {\n    91→      const result = approveTransaction();\n    92→\n    93→      notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n    94→\n    95→      if (result.isFull) {\n    96→        notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n    97→        // Reject remaining pending applications\n    98→        const pendingApps = db\n    99→          .prepare(\n   100→            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n   101→          )\n   102→          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n   103→\n   104→        for (const app of pendingApps) {\n   105→          db.prepare(\n   106→            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   107→          ).run(app.id);\n   108→          notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   109→        }\n   110→      }\n   111→\n   112→      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   113→    } catch (err) {\n   114→      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n   115→      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n   116→    }\n   117→  } else {\n   118→    // Reject\n   119→    db.prepare(\n   120→      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   121→    ).run(applicationId);\n   122→\n   123→    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   124→\n   125→    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   126→  }\n   127→}\n   128→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_016KRVynExK2khS6vbSRMzhc","session_id":"56b902f7-a667-4b55-8104-777174b59df9","uuid":"3b96697a-545e-441f-8558-ed12e332fc57","timestamp":"2026-03-20T18:01:48.362Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_014uaZvC3GizSqDWoexavhkz","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01A9HGzTixoptV2tppZvCghh","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/ratings/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3309,"cache_read_input_tokens":27799,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":3309,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":25,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_016KRVynExK2khS6vbSRMzhc","session_id":"56b902f7-a667-4b55-8104-777174b59df9","uuid":"4743f1ff-6b3f-4aab-baf7-f0ce60d9c196"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01A9HGzTixoptV2tppZvCghh","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * POST /api/ratings — Submit a rating for a group member\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Body: { listingId, ratedUserId, score (1-5), comment? }\n    10→ *\n    11→ * Rules:\n    12→ * - Both rater and rated must be members of the listing\n    13→ * - The listing must be full (group completed)\n    14→ * - Cannot rate yourself\n    15→ * - One rating per rater-rated pair per listing (can update)\n    16→ */\n    17→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    18→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    19→  if (!session) {\n    20→    return NextResponse.json(\n    21→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    22→      { status: 401 }\n    23→    );\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  const body = await req.json();\n    27→  const { listingId, ratedUserId, score, comment } = body;\n    28→\n    29→  if (!listingId || !ratedUserId || !score) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json(\n    31→      { error: \"listingId, ratedUserId, and score are required\" },\n    32→      { status: 400 }\n    33→    );\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  if (score < 1 || score > 5 || !Number.isInteger(score)) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"Score must be an integer between 1 and 5\" },\n    39→      { status: 400 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    44→    return NextResponse.json(\n    45→      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n    46→      { status: 400 }\n    47→    );\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  if (comment && comment.length > 1000) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Comment must be at most 1000 characters\" },\n    53→      { status: 400 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  // Verify listing exists and is full\n    58→  const listing = db\n    59→    .prepare(\"SELECT id, book_title, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    60→    .get(listingId) as { id: number; book_title: string; is_full: number } | undefined;\n    61→\n    62→  if (!listing) {\n    63→    return NextResponse.json(\n    64→      { error: \"Listing not found\" },\n    65→      { status: 404 }\n    66→    );\n    67→  }\n    68→\n    69→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    70→    return NextResponse.json(\n    71→      { error: \"Ratings are only available for completed reading groups\" },\n    72→      { status: 400 }\n    73→    );\n    74→  }\n    75→\n    76→  // Verify both users are members\n    77→  const raterMember = db\n    78→    .prepare(\n    79→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    80→    )\n    81→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    82→\n    83→  if (!raterMember) {\n    84→    return NextResponse.json(\n    85→      { error: \"You must be a member of this group to rate\" },\n    86→      { status: 403 }\n    87→    );\n    88→  }\n    89→\n    90→  const ratedMember = db\n    91→    .prepare(\n    92→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    93→    )\n    94→    .get(listingId, ratedUserId);\n    95→\n    96→  if (!ratedMember) {\n    97→    return NextResponse.json(\n    98→      { error: \"The user you are rating must be a member of this group\" },\n    99→      { status: 400 }\n   100→    );\n   101→  }\n   102→\n   103→  // Upsert rating (update if exists)\n   104→  const existing = db\n   105→    .prepare(\n   106→      \"SELECT id FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ? AND rater_id = ? AND rated_user_id = ?\"\n   107→    )\n   108→    .get(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId) as { id: number } | undefined;\n   109→\n   110→  if (existing) {\n   111→    db.prepare(\n   112→      \"UPDATE ratings SET score = ?, comment = ?, created_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   113→    ).run(score, comment || \"\", existing.id);\n   114→  } else {\n   115→    db.prepare(\n   116→      \"INSERT INTO ratings (listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id, score, comment) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n   117→    ).run(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId, score, comment || \"\");\n   118→\n   119→    // Notify the rated user\n   120→    createNotification(\n   121→      ratedUserId,\n   122→      listingId,\n   123→      \"rating_received\",\n   124→      `Someone rated your participation in \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n   125→    );\n   126→  }\n   127→\n   128→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   129→}\n   130→\n   131→/**\n   132→ * GET /api/ratings?listingId=X — Get ratings for a listing\n   133→ *\n   134→ * Returns ratings the current user has given and received in a listing,\n   135→ * plus the members who can still be rated.\n   136→ */\n   137→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n   138→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   139→  if (!session) {\n   140→    return NextResponse.json(\n   141→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n   142→      { status: 401 }\n   143→    );\n   144→  }\n   145→\n   146→  const listingId = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"listingId\");\n   147→  if (!listingId) {\n   148→    return NextResponse.json(\n   149→      { error: \"listingId parameter required\" },\n   150→      { status: 400 }\n   151→    );\n   152→  }\n   153→\n   154→  // Verify the current user is a member of this listing\n   155→  const isMember = db\n   156→    .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n   157→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n   158→  if (!isMember) {\n   159→    return NextResponse.json(\n   160→      { error: \"You are not a member of this group\" },\n   161→      { status: 403 }\n   162→    );\n   163→  }\n   164→\n   165→  // Ratings the current user has given in this listing\n   166→  const givenRatings = db\n   167→    .prepare(\n   168→      `SELECT r.rated_user_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   169→       FROM ratings r\n   170→       JOIN users u ON r.rated_user_id = u.id\n   171→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rater_id = ?`\n   172→    )\n   173→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   174→      rated_user_id: number;\n   175→      score: number;\n   176→      comment: string;\n   177→      display_name: string;\n   178→    }[];\n   179→\n   180→  // Ratings the current user has received in this listing\n   181→  const receivedRatings = db\n   182→    .prepare(\n   183→      `SELECT r.rater_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   184→       FROM ratings r\n   185→       JOIN users u ON r.rater_id = u.id\n   186→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rated_user_id = ?`\n   187→    )\n   188→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   189→      rater_id: number;\n   190→      score: number;\n   191→      comment: string;\n   192→      display_name: string;\n   193→    }[];\n   194→\n   195→  return NextResponse.json({\n   196→    givenRatings,\n   197→    receivedRatings,\n   198→  });\n   199→}\n   200→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_016KRVynExK2khS6vbSRMzhc","session_id":"56b902f7-a667-4b55-8104-777174b59df9","uuid":"29bd1be2-f715-4caa-8c10-282946b6a888","timestamp":"2026-03-20T18:01:48.455Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_011Bp1qkTMNbxupNk3S1KGC2","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useState } from \"react\";\n     4→import { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n     5→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     6→\n     7→export default function LoginPage() {\n     8→  const [email, setEmail] = useState(\"\");\n     9→  const [password, setPassword] = useState(\"\");\n    10→  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n    11→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n    12→  const router = useRouter();\n    13→\n    14→  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    15→    e.preventDefault();\n    16→    setError(\"\");\n    17→    setLoading(true);\n    18→\n    19→    try {\n    20→      const res = await fetch(\"/api/auth/login\", {\n    21→        method: \"POST\",\n    22→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n    23→        body: JSON.stringify({ email, password }),\n    24→      });\n    25→      const data = await res.json();\n    26→\n    27→      if (!res.ok) {\n    28→        setError(data.error || \"Login failed\");\n    29→        return;\n    30→      }\n    31→\n    32→      router.push(\"/\");\n    33→      router.refresh();\n    34→    } catch {\n    35→      setError(\"Something went wrong. Please try again.\");\n    36→    } finally {\n    37→      setLoading(false);\n    38→    }\n    39→  };\n    40→\n    41→  return (\n    42→    <div className=\"max-w-md mx-auto mt-12\">\n    43→      <div className=\"card\">\n    44→        <h1 className=\"text-2xl mb-1\">Welcome back</h1>\n    45→        <p\n    46→          className=\"mb-6\"\n    47→          style={{\n    48→            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n    49→            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n    50→            fontSize: \"0.9rem\",\n    51→          }}\n    52→        >\n    53→          Sign in to continue reading with your groups\n    54→        </p>\n    55→\n    56→        {error && (\n    57→          <div\n    58→            className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n    59→            style={{\n    60→              backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n    61→              color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n    62→              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n    63→            }}\n    64→          >\n    65→            {error}\n    66→          </div>\n    67→        )}\n    68→\n    69→        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"space-y-4\">\n    70→          <div>\n    71→            <label\n    72→              className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n    73→              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n    74→            >\n    75→              Email\n    76→            </label>\n    77→            <input\n    78→              type=\"email\"\n    79→              className=\"input-field\"\n    80→              value={email}\n    81→              onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}\n    82→              required\n    83→              placeholder=\"you@example.com\"\n    84→            />\n    85→          </div>\n    86→\n    87→          <div>\n    88→            <label\n    89→              className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n    90→              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n    91→            >\n    92→              Password\n    93→            </label>\n    94→            <input\n    95→              type=\"password\"\n    96→              className=\"input-field\"\n    97→              value={password}\n    98→              onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}\n    99→              required\n   100→              placeholder=\"Your password\"\n   101→            />\n   102→          </div>\n   103→\n   104→          <button\n   105→            type=\"submit\"\n   106→            className=\"btn-primary w-full\"\n   107→            disabled={loading}\n   108→          >\n   109→            {loading ? \"Signing in...\" : \"Sign in\"}\n   110→          </button>\n   111→        </form>\n   112→\n   113→        <p\n   114→          className=\"text-sm text-center mt-4\"\n   115→          style={{\n   116→            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   117→            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   118→          }}\n   119→        >\n   120→          Don&apos;t have an account?{\" \"}\n   121→          <Link\n   122→            href=\"/auth/register\"\n   123→            className=\"font-semibold\"\n   124→            style={{ color: \"var(--color-accent)\" }}\n   125→          >\n   126→            Sign up\n   127→          </Link>\n   128→        </p>\n   129→      </div>\n   130→    </div>\n   131→  );\n   132→}\n   133→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_016KRVynExK2khS6vbSRMzhc","session_id":"56b902f7-a667-4b55-8104-777174b59df9","uuid":"fdca5cc7-7ccc-4783-98c9-b0a4982009d8","timestamp":"2026-03-20T18:01:52.020Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01GrvZyrC9kVdyu97sFSWKpJ","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from \"react\";\n     4→import { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n     5→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     6→\n     7→interface ReadingItem {\n     8→  id: number;\n     9→  book_title: string;\n    10→  book_author: string;\n    11→  book_cover_url: string;\n    12→  reading_pace: string;\n    13→  start_date: string;\n    14→  meeting_format: string;\n    15→  is_full: number>;\n    29→  recentRatings: {\n    30→    score: number;\n    31→    comment: string;\n    32→    created_at: string;\n    33→    book_title: string;\n    34→  }[];\n    35→}\n    36→\n    37→type TabKey = \"profile\" | \"reading\" | \"genres\" | \"reputation\";\n    38→\n    39→export default function ProfilePage() {\n    40→  const router = useRouter();\n    41→  const [displayName, {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01KDcggGT14WbjF4fzJNho1P","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\n     4→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     5→\n     6→interface Notification {\n     7→  id: number;\n     8→  listing_id: number;\n     9→  type: string;\n    10→  message: string;\n    11→  is_read: number;\n    12→  created_at: string;\n    13→  book_title: string;\n    14→}\n    15→\n    16→export default function NotificationsPage() {\n    17→  const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState<Notification[]>([]);\n    18→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    19→\n    20→  useEffect(() => {\n    21→    fetch(\"/api/notifications\")\n    22→      .then((r) => r.json())\n    23→      .then((data) => {\n    24→        setNotifications(data.notifications || []);\n    25→        setLoading(false);\n    26→        // Mark all as read\n    27→        fetch(\"/api/notifications\", {\n    28→          method: \"PATCH\",\n    29→          headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n    30→          body: JSON.stringify({}),\n    31→        });\n    32→      });\n    33→  }, []);\n    34→\n    35→  if (loading) {\n    36→    return (\n    37→      <div className=\"text-center py-16\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n    38→        <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>Loading...</p>\n    39→      </div>\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  return (\n    44→    <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n    45→      <h1 className=\"text-3xl mb-6\">Notifications</h1>\n    46→\n    47→      {notifications.length === 0 ? (\n    48→        <div className=\"text-center py-12\">\n    49→          <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n    50→            No notifications yet\n    51→          </p>\n    52→        </div>\n    53→      ) : (\n    54→        <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n    55→          {notifications.map((n) => (\n    56→            <Link\n    57→              key={n.id}\n    58→              href={n.listing_id ? `/listings/${n.listing_id}` : \"#\"}\n    59→              className=\"card block hover:shadow-sm transition-shadow\"\n    60→              style={{\n    61→                borderLeftWidth: \"3px\",\n    62→                borderLeftColor: n.is_read\n    63→                  ? \"var(--color-border)\"\n    64→                  : \"var(--color-accent)\",\n    65→              }}\n    66→            >\n    67→              <p\n    68→                className=\"text-sm\"\n    69→                style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n    70→              >\n    71→                {n.message}\n    72→              </p>\n    73→              <p\n    74→                className=\"text-xs mt-1\"\n    75→                style={{\n    76→                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n    77→                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n    78→                }}\n    79→              >\n    80→                {new Date(n.created_at).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n    81→                  month: \"short\",\n    82→                  day: \"numeric\",\n    83→                  hour: \"numeric\",\n    84→                  minute: \"2-digit\",\n    85→                })}\n    86→              </p>\n    87→            </Link>\n    88→          ))}\n    89→        </div>\n    90→      )}\n    91→    </div>\n    92→  );\n    93→}\n    94→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_016KRVynExK2khS6vbSRMzhc","session_id":"56b902f7-a667-4b55-8104-777174b59df9","uuid":"4f7157e8-abd4-4a1f-abbd-b0c4ba9607d3","timestamp":"2026-03-20T18:01:52.669Z"}

\"next/link\";\n     4→import { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\n     5→import { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n     6→\n     7→interface User {\n     8→  id: number;\n     9→  email: string;\n    10→  displayName: string;\n    11→}\n    12→\n    13→export default function Navbar() {\n    14→  const [user, setUser] = useState<User | null>(null);\n    15→  const [notifCount, setNotifCount] = useState(0);\n    16→  const [menuOpen, setMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n    17→  const router = useRouter();\n    18→\n    19→  useEffect(() => {\n    20→    fetch(\"/api/auth/me\")\n    21→      .then((r) => r.json())\n    22→      .then((data) => {\n    23→        if (data.user) {\n    24→          setUser(data.user);\n    25→          // Fetch setMenuOpen(false);\n    37→    router.push(\"/\");\n    38→    router.refresh();\n    39→  };\n    40→\n    41→  return (\n    42→    <nav\n    43→      className=\"border-b sticky top-0 z-50\"\n padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\" }}\n    65→              >\n    66→                + New Listing\n    67→              </Link>\n    68→\n    69→              <div className=\"relative\">\n    70→ fontFamily: \"system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif\" }}\n    74→                >\n    75→                  <div\n    76→                    className=\"w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center {notifCount}\n    87→                    </span>\n    88→                  )}\n    89→                </button>\n    90→\n    91→                {menuOpen && (\n    92→                  <div\n    93→   123→                          style={{\n   124→                            backgroundColor: \"var(--color-error)\",\n   125→                            fontSize: \"0.6rem\",\n   126→ {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01UzRToGtX23rHPDs4BKdSgh","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_015NLGnCnACLD5AawiER28YV","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/notifications/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3853,"cache_read_input_tokens":36825,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":3853,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":25,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_016KRVynExK2khS6vbSRMzhc","session_id":"56b902f7-a667-4b55-8104-777174b59df9","uuid":"c279a4dd-19e7-46f8-b36b-a51ced8e7034"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_015NLGnCnACLD5AawiER28YV","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function GET() {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const notifications = db\n    12→    .prepare(\n    13→      `SELECT n.*, l.book_title\n    14→       FROM notifications n\n    15→       LEFT JOIN listings l ON n.listing_id = l.id\n    16→       WHERE n.user_id = ?\n    17→       ORDER BY n.created_at DESC\n    18→       LIMIT 50`\n    19→    )\n    20→    .all(session.userId);\n    21→\n    22→  const unreadCount = db\n    23→    .prepare(\n    24→      \"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0\"\n    25→    )\n    26→    .get(session.userId) as { count: number };\n    27→\n    28→  return NextResponse.json({\n    29→    notifications,\n    30→    unreadCount: unreadCount.count,\n    31→  });\n    32→}\n    33→\n    34→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n    35→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    36→  if (!session) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    38→  }\n    39→\n    40→  const { notificationId } = await req.json();\n    41→\n    42→  if (notificationId) {\n    43→    db.prepare(\n    44→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    45→    ).run(notificationId, session.userId);\n    46→  } else {\n    47→    // Mark all as read\n    48→    db.prepare(\n    49→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = ?\"\n    50→    ).run(session.userId);\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    54→}\n    55→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_016KRVynExK2khS6vbSRMzhc","session_id":"56b902f7-a667-4b55-8104-777174b59df9","uuid":"596ea14c-b6a7-494e-8c65-3c394c86fb4a","timestamp":"2026-03-20T18:01:59.409Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Ppuk23P619MX7R2VGkUiyZ","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const { displayName, bio } = await req.json();\n    12→\n    13→  if (!displayName || displayName.trim().length === 0) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name is required\" }, { status: 400 });\n    15→  }\n    16→\n    17→  if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  if (bio && bio.length > 500) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Bio must be at most 500 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE users SET display_name = ?, bio = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    26→    displayName.trim(),\n    27→    (bio || \"\").trim(),\n    28→    session.userId\n    29→  );\n    30→\n    31→  // Update session\n    32→  session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    33→  await session.save();\n    34→\n    35→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    36→}\n    37→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_016KRVynExK2khS6vbSRMzhc","session_id":"56b902f7-a667-4b55-8104-777174b59df9","uuid":"f9ce82f5-306b-433b-b6a7-636f954c1451","timestamp":"2026-03-20T18:01:59.713Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Rs49vwQZ5kxxRNVjQLFde2","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useState } from \"react\";\n     4→import { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n     5→import BookSearch from \"@/components/BookSearch\";\n     6→\n     7→export default function CreateListingPage() {\n     8→  const router = useRouter();\n     9→  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n    10→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n    11→\n    12→  const [bookTitle, setBookTitle] = useState(\"\");\n    13→  const [bookAuthor, setBookAuthor] = useState(\"\");\n    14→  const [bookCoverUrl, setBookCoverUrl] = useState(\"\");\n    15→  const [bookOlid, setBookOlid] = useState(\"\");\n    16→  const [language, setLanguage] = useState(\"English\");\n    17→  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n    18→  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState(\"\");\n    19→  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"text\");\n    20→  const [maxGroupSize, setMaxGroupSize] = useState(\"4\");\n    21→  const [requiresApproval, setRequiresApproval] = useState(false);\n    22→  const [platformPreference, setPlatformPreference] = useState(\"telegram\");\n    23→\n    24→  const handleBookSelect = (book: {\n    25→    title: string;\n    26→    author: string;\n    27→    coverUrl: string;\n    28→    olid: string;\n    29→  }) => {\n    30→    setBookTitle(book.title);\n    31→    setBookAuthor(book.author);\n    32→    setBookCoverUrl(book.coverUrl);\n    33→    setBookOlid(book.olid);\n    34→  };\n    35→\n    36→  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    37→    e.preventDefault();\n    38→    setError(\"\");\n    39→    setLoading(true);\n    40→\n    41→    try {\n    42→      const res = await fetch(\"/api/listings/create\", {\n    43→        method: \"POST\",\n    44→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n    45→        body: JSON.stringify({\n    46→          bookTitle,\n    47→          bookAuthor,\n    48→          bookCoverUrl,\n    49→          bookOlid,\n    50→          language,\n    51→          readingPace,\n    52→          startDate,\n    53→          meetingFormat,\n    54→          maxGroupSize,\n    55→          requiresApproval,\n    56→          platformPreference,\n    57→        }),\n    58→      });\n    59→\n    60→      const data = await res.json();\n    61→\n    62→      if (!res.ok) {\n    63→        if (res.status === 401) {\n    64→          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n    65→          return;\n    66→        }\n    67→        setError(data.error || \"Failed to create listing\");\n    68→        return;\n    69→      }\n    70→\n    71→      router.push(`/listings/${data.id}`);\n    72→    } catch {\n    73→      setError(\"Something went wrong. Please try again.\");\n    74→    } finally {\n    75→      setLoading(false);\n    76→    }\n    77→  };\n    78→\n    79→  return (\n    80→    <div className=\"max-w-lg mx-auto\">"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_016KRVynExK2khS6vbSRMzhc","session_id":"56b902f7-a667-4b55-8104-777174b59df9","uuid":"d7a75b29-0d55-49de-b8f0-5bce812825b8","timestamp":"2026-03-20T18:02:04.106Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"a1f5e46afabb2fbba","tool_use_id":"toolu_016KRVynExK2khS6vbSRMzhc","description":"Reading app/api/profile/reputation/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":44658,"tool_uses":29,"duration_ms":56399},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"d0e8bd74-0767-43f6-b7cd-92e4529a9545","session_id":"56b902f7-a667-4b55-8104-777174b59df9"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01U2g1sXjuKAZNKe8GN6dLoC","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01QY9K1QG3uAq6EnQW3cCaQk","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reputation/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3274,"cache_read_input_tokens":40678,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":3274,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":24,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_016KRVynExK2khS6vbSRMzhc","session_id":"56b902f7-a667-4b55-8104-777174b59df9","uuid":"bada8d51-28dd-4c44-a655-6922bdd4146a"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01QY9K1QG3uAq6EnQW3cCaQk","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→/**\n     6→ * GET /api/profile/reputation?userId=X\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Returns a user's reputation score and rating breakdown.\n     9→ * If no userId is provided, returns the current user's reputation.\n    10→ */\n    11→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n    12→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    13→  if (!session) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json(\n    15→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    16→      { status: 401 }\n    17→    );\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const userIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"userId\");\n    21→  const userId = userIdParam ? parseInt(userIdParam, 10) : session.userId;\n    22→  const isOwnProfile = userId === session.userId;\n    23→\n    24→  if (userIdParam && isNaN(userId as number)) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json(\n    26→      { error: \"Invalid userId parameter\" },\n    27→      { status: 400 }\n    28→    );\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  // Average score\n    32→  const stats = db\n    33→    .prepare(\n    34→      `SELECT\n    35→        COUNT(*) as total_ratings,\n    36→        ROUND(AVG(score), 1) as average_score,\n    37→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as five_star,\n    38→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as four_star,\n    39→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as three_star,\n    40→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as two_star,\n    41→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as one_star\n    42→       FROM ratings\n    43→       WHERE rated_user_id = ?`\n    44→    )\n    45→    .get(userId) as {\n    46→      total_ratings: number;\n    47→      average_score: number | null;\n    48→      five_star: number;\n    49→      four_star: number;\n    50→      three_star: number;\n    51→      two_star: number;\n    52→      one_star: number;\n    53→    };\n    54→\n    55→  // Number of completed groups\n    56→  const completedGroups = db\n    57→    .prepare(\n    58→      `SELECT COUNT(*) as count\n    59→       FROM listing_members lm\n    60→       JOIN listings l ON lm.listing_id = l.id\n    61→       WHERE lm.user_id = ? AND l.is_full = 1`\n    62→    )\n    63→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    64→\n    65→  // Number of groups where this user has given ratings\n    66→  const groupsRated = db\n    67→    .prepare(\n    68→      `SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT listing_id) as count\n    69→       FROM ratings\n    70→       WHERE rater_id = ?`\n    71→    )\n    72→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    73→\n    74→  // Recent ratings received (with anonymized feedback)\n    75→  const recentRatings = db\n    76→    .prepare(\n    77→      `SELECT r.score, r.comment, r.created_at, l.book_title\n    78→       FROM ratings r\n    79→       JOIN listings l ON r.listing_id = l.id\n    80→       WHERE r.rated_user_id = ?\n    81→       ORDER BY r.created_at DESC\n    82→       LIMIT 10`\n    83→    )\n    84→    .all(userId) as {\n    85→      score: number;\n    86→      comment: string;\n    87→      created_at: string;\n    88→      book_title: string;\n    89→    }[];\n    90→\n    91→  // Strip comments from ratings when viewing other users' profiles (privacy)\n    92→  const sanitizedRatings = isOwnProfile\n    93→    ? recentRatings\n    94→    : recentRatings.map(({ score, created_at, book_title }) => ({\n    95→        score,\n    96→        created_at,\n    97→        book_title,\n    98→      }));\n    99→\n   100→  return NextResponse.json({\n   101→    reputation: {\n   102→      averageScore: stats.average_score || 0,\n   103→      totalRatings: stats.total_ratings,\n   104→      completedGroups: completedGroups.count,\n   105→      groupsRated: groupsRated.count,\n   106→      breakdown: {\n   107→        5: stats.five_star || 0,\n   108→        4: stats.four_star || 0,\n   109→        3: stats.three_star || 0,\n   110→        2: stats.two_star || 0,\n   111→        1: stats.one_star || 0,\n   112→      },\n   113→      recentRatings: sanitizedRatings,\n   114→    },\n   115→  });\n   116→}\n   117→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_016KRVynExK2khS6vbSRMzhc","session_id":"56b902f7-a667-4b55-8104-777174b59df9","uuid":"e3b57c9e-e0b3-49cd-91fb-6e128b2c42e2","timestamp":"2026-03-20T18:02:04.455Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01A8gds9iUsSXuB4riTWAPHn","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01MSUQuBWfi7pEFmiiQLCxWF","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reading/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2574,"cache_read_input_tokens":43952,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2574,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":18,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_016KRVynExK2khS6vbSRMzhc","session_id":"56b902f7-a667-4b55-8104-777174b59df9","uuid":"95666075-9079-42b0-aae8-1b825cd34d08"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01MSUQuBWfi7pEFmiiQLCxWF","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→interface ReadingRow {\n     6→  id: number;\n     7→  book_title: string;\n     8→  book_author: string;\n     9→  book_cover_url: string;\n    10→  reading_pace: string;\n    11→  start_date: string;\n    12→  meeting_format: string;\n    13→  is_full: number;\n    14→  telegram_link: string;\n    15→  member_count: number;\n    16→  max_group_size: number;\n    17→  author_name: string;\n    18→  joined_at: string;\n    19→}\n    20→\n    21→export async function GET() {\n    22→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    23→  if (!session) {\n    24→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    25→  }\n    26→\n    27→  // Get all listings the user is a member of (including ones they authored)\n    28→  const readings = db.prepare(`\n    29→    SELECT\n    30→      l.id,\n    31→      l.book_title,\n    32→      l.book_author,\n    33→      l.book_cover_url,\n    34→      l.reading_pace,\n    35→      l.start_date,\n    36→      l.meeting_format,\n    37→      l.is_full,\n    38→      l.telegram_link,\n    39→      l.max_group_size,\n    40→      u.display_name as author_name,\n    41→      lm.joined_at,\n    42→      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    43→    FROM listing_members lm\n    44→    JOIN listings l ON l.id = lm.listing_id\n    45→    JOIN users u ON u.id = l.author_id\n    46→    WHERE lm.user_id = ?\n    47→    ORDER BY lm.joined_at DESC\n    48→  `).all(session.userId) as ReadingRow[];\n    49→\n    50→  const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    51→\n    52→  // Currently reading: groups that are full (active) or start_date <= today\n    53→  const currentlyReading = readings.filter(\n    54→    (r) => r.is_full === 1 || r.start_date <= today\n    55→  );\n    56→\n    57→  // Reading history: completed groups (full + start_date in the past)\n    58→  // Upcoming: not yet started and not full\n    59→  const history = readings.filter(\n    60→    (r) => r.is_full === 1 && r.start_date < today\n    61→  );\n    62→\n    63→  const upcoming = readings.filter(\n    64→    (r) => r.is_full === 0 && r.start_date > today\n    65→  );\n    66→\n    67→  const active = readings.filter(\n    68→    (r) => !history.includes(r) && !upcoming.includes(r) && (r.is_full === 1 || r.start_date <= today)\n    69→  );\n    70→\n    71→  return NextResponse.json({\n    72→    active,\n    73→    history,\n    74→    upcoming,\n    75→    total: readings.length,\n    76→  });\n    77→}\n    78→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_016KRVynExK2khS6vbSRMzhc","session_id":"56b902f7-a667-4b55-8104-777174b59df9","uuid":"7bfaa6f6-b169-46ec-80df-f5c320a22c0b","timestamp":"2026-03-20T18:02:09.476Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_013zwKSQnLmVHj4jPR83pwe4","type":"tool_result","content":"   220→    } catch {\n   221→      setError(\"Failed to process application. Please try again.\");\n   222→    } finally {\n   223→      setDecidingId(null);\n   224→    }\n   225→  };\n   226→\n   227→  const isValidTelegramLink = (link: string) => {\n   228→    return /^https:\\/\\/t\\.me\\/[\\w+/]+$/.test(link.trim());\n   229→  };\n   230→\n   231→  const telegramLinkError = telegramLink && !isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)\n   232→    ? \"Link must start with https://t.me/ (e.g., https://t.me/+AbCdEfGhIjK)\"\n   233→    : \"\";\n   234→\n   235→  const handleTelegramSave = async () => {\n   236→    if (!isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)) return;\n   237→    setTelegramSaving(true);\n   238→    setError(\"\");\n   239→    try {\n   240→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/telegram`, {\n   241→        method: \"POST\",\n   242→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n   243→        body: JSON.stringify({ telegramLink: telegramLink.trim() }),\n   244→      });\n   245→      const data = await res.json();\n   246→      if (!res.ok) {\n   247→        setError(data.error);\n   248→        return;\n   249→      }\n   250→      await fetchListing();\n   251→    } catch {\n   252→      setError(\"Failed to save link. Please try again.\");\n   253→    } finally {\n   254→      setTelegramSaving(false);\n   255→    }\n   256→  };\n   257→\n   258→  const handleAutoTelegram = async () => {\n   259→    setAutoTelegramLoading(true);\n   260→    setError(\"\");\n   261→    try {\n   262→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/auto-telegram`);\n   263→      const data = await res.json();\n   264→      if (!res.ok) {\n   265→        setError(data.error || \"Failed to generate Telegram link\");\n   266→        return;\n   267→      }\n   268→      setAutoTelegramLink(data.deepLink);\n   269→    } catch {\n   270→      setError(\"Failed to connect. Please try again.\");\n   271→    } finally {\n   272→      setAutoTelegramLoading(false);\n   273→    }\n   274→  };\n   275→\n   276→  const isValidDiscordLink = (link: string) => {\n   277→    return /^https:\\/\\/(discord\\.gg|discord\\.com\\/invite)\\/[\\w-]+$/.test(link.trim());\n   278→  };\n   279→\n   280→  const discordLinkError = discordLink && !isValidDiscordLink(discordLink)\n   281→    ? \"Link must start with https://discord.gg/ or https://discord.com/invite/\"\n   282→    : \"\";\n   283→\n   284→  const handleDiscordSave = async () => {\n   285→    if (!isValidDiscordLink(discordLink)) return;\n   286→    setDiscordSaving(true);\n   287→    setError(\"\");\n   288→    try {\n   289→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/discord`, {\n   290→        method: \"POST\",\n   291→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n   292→        body: JSON.stringify({ discordLink: discordLink.trim() }),\n   293→      });\n   294→      const data = await res.json();\n   295→      if (!res.ok) {\n   296→        setError(data.error);\n   297→        return;\n   298→      }\n   299→      await fetchListing();\n   300→    } catch {\n   301→      setError(\"Failed to save link. Please try again.\");\n   302→    } finally {\n   303→      setDiscordSaving(false);\n   304→    }\n   305→  };\n   306→\n   307→  const handleAutoDiscord = async () => {\n   308→    setAutoDiscordLoading(true);\n   309→    setError(\"\");\n   310→    try {\n   311→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/auto-discord`);\n   312→      const data = await res.json();\n   313→      if (!res.ok) {\n   314→        setError(data.error || \"Failed to generate Discord link\");\n   315→        return;\n   316→      }\n   317→      setAutoDiscordLink(data.inviteUrl);\n   318→    } catch {\n   319→      setError(\"Failed to connect. Please try again.\");"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_016KRVynExK2khS6vbSRMzhc","session_id":"56b902f7-a667-4b55-8104-777174b59df9","uuid":"9647875a-b6f2-4186-b5c5-9d12dd1da50b","timestamp":"2026-03-20T18:02:10.020Z"}

{"type":"system","subtype":"task_notification","task_id":"a1f5e46afabb2fbba","tool_use_id":"toolu_016KRVynExK2khS6vbSRMzhc","status":"completed","output_file":"","summary":"Review codebase for improvements","usage":{"total_tokens":49923,"tool_uses":33,"duration_ms":116234},"uuid":"6726f9cd-5b4b-4a8a-a08a-d41e479f6aa8","session_id":"56b902f7-a667-4b55-8104-777174b59df9"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_016KRVynExK2khS6vbSRMzhc","type":"tool_result","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Here is the full analysis.\n\n---\n\n## Prioritized Top 5 Improvements\n\n---\n\n### 1. No Rate Limiting on Auth Endpoints (Security - High Priority)\n\n**Files:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/login/route.ts`, `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/register/route.ts`\n\nThe login endpoint calls `bcrypt.compare` on every request with no protection against brute-force attacks. An attacker can hammer `/api/auth/login` in a tight loop to enumerate passwords. The `bcrypt` cost factor is 12 (good), but that just means each attempt takes ~300ms - not a meaningful deterrent against a botnet. The registration endpoint is similarly wide open to account creation spam.\n\nWhat needs to change: Add in-memory rate limiting (e.g., `lru-cache` + a counter map) keyed on `IP + email` for login attempts, with a limit like 5 attempts per 15-minute window returning 429. The same applies to `/api/auth/register` keyed on IP. This is a standalone addition of ~30 lines and zero dependencies beyond what's already installed.\n\nNo CSRF protection gap exists here because iron-session cookies are `SameSite: lax` and the endpoints are JSON-only (no form submissions), which is acceptable.\n\n---\n\n### 2. Navbar Makes Two Sequential Unauthenticated Fetches on Every Page Load (Performance - High Priority)\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/Navbar.tsx`, lines 19-31\n\nThe Navbar performs `fetch(\"/api/auth/me\")` and then, if logged in, a second `fetch(\"/api/notifications\")` - these are chained (the notification fetch is nested inside the `.then()` of the auth fetch), so they execute sequentially. This adds two round-trips to every page render. For a logged-in user on a slow connection, that is two full network waterfalls before the nav renders correctly.\n\nAdditionally, the `/api/notifications` endpoint runs two SQL queries (notifications + unread count) every time the Navbar mounts - so every page load issues 3 DB queries just to render the notification badge.\n\nWhat needs to change: Merge the unread count into `/api/auth/me` as an `unreadNotificationCount` field in the response. That collapses two round-trips into one, and the Navbar code becomes a single `fetch`. The `GET /api/notifications` call can be deferred to when the user actually opens the notifications page.\n\n**Files to touch:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/me/route.ts`, `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/Navbar.tsx`\n\n---\n\n### 3. `notifyGroupFull` Issues N+1 DB Queries and Email Calls (Performance + Reliability)\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts`, lines 109-132\n\n`notifyGroupFull` fetches all members of a listing and then calls `createNotification()` for each member in a `for` loop. Inside `createNotification`, there is another `getUserEmail()` query per user (line 5-9), followed by a fire-and-forget `sendEmail`. For a group of 10, this produces 10 INSERT queries + 10 `SELECT email` queries + up to 10 email sends, all executed synchronously on the API request thread that triggered the join/approve action.\n\nThis same pattern also exists in `notifyApplicationDecision` in `applications/route.ts` lines 104-109, which loops through remaining applicants and calls `notifyApplicationDecision` per applicant.\n\nWhat needs to change: Batch the member email lookup in `notifyGroupFull` into a single `WHERE user_id IN (...)` query. For the notifications insert, use a single `INSERT INTO notifications ... VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?), (?, ?, ?, ?) ...` batch insert via a transaction. This converts O(n) queries into O(1).\n\n---\n\n### 4. Listing Detail Page Has No Error State for Failed Fetch + `fetchListing` Has No Error Handling (UX - Medium Priority)\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/[id]/ListingDetail.tsx`, lines 81-92\n\nThe `fetchListing` function does not have a `try/catch`. If the network request fails (not a 404, but an actual error), `setLoading(false)` is never called - the component stays in the loading spinner forever with no feedback. There is also no error state rendered for a general fetch failure; the `notAvailable` state only covers 404s.\n\nCompare this to the homepage (`page.tsx` line 54) which at least has `.catch(() => setLoading(false))`.\n\nWhat needs to change: Wrap `fetchListing` in a `try/catch`, add a general `fetchError` state, and render a message like \"Failed to load this listing - please refresh\" when it fires. The `setLoading(false)` call should be in a `finally` block.\n\nThe same issue exists in `profile/page.tsx` line 69-78, where `fetch(\"/api/auth/me\")` has no `.catch()` - if the request fails, the profile page spins forever.\n\n---\n\n### 5. Missing Indexes on `listing_applications` and `notifications.is_read` Filter (Performance - Medium Priority)\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/db.ts`, lines 160-166\n\nThe existing indexes cover `listing_members.user_id`, `notifications.user_id`, `ratings.rated_user_id`, and `listings.author_id`. Two high-frequency query patterns are not indexed:\n\n- `listing_applications` is queried by `(listing_id, status)` in three places: `[id]/route.ts` (pending applicants panel), `[id]/applications/route.ts` (approve/reject loop), and `[id]/apply/route.ts`. There is a `UNIQUE(listing_id, user_id)` constraint (which creates an index on that pair) but no index on `(listing_id, status)` - meaning filtering pending applications requires a full scan of the applications for that listing.\n\n- `GET /api/notifications` runs `WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0` (line 22 of the route) for the unread count, but the only index is on `user_id` alone. As the notifications table grows, the `is_read = 0` filter requires scanning all of a user's notifications.\n\nWhat needs to change: Add to `db.ts` after the existing index block:\n\n```sql\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_listing_applications_listing_status \n  ON listing_applications(listing_id, status);\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notifications_user_unread \n  ON notifications(user_id, is_read);\n```\n\nThese are low-risk, additive changes using the existing `CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS` pattern already in the file.\n\n---\n\n### Summary Table\n\n| Priority | Issue | Category | Files |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| 1 | No brute-force protection on login/register | Security | `api/auth/login/route.ts`, `api/auth/register/route.ts` |\n| 2 | Navbar double-fetch on every page load | Performance/UX | `components/Navbar.tsx`, `api/auth/me/route.ts` |\n| 3 | N+1 queries in `notifyGroupFull` / notification loops | Performance | `lib/notifications.ts`, `api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts` |\n| 4 | No error handling in `fetchListing` and `profile` fetch | UX | `listings/[id]/ListingDetail.tsx`, `profile/page.tsx` |\n| 5 | Missing indexes on `listing_applications` and `notifications` | Performance | `lib/db.ts` |\n\n---\n\n### Key Files Referenced\n\n- `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/login/route.ts`\n- `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/register/route.ts`\n- `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/me/route.ts`\n- `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/Navbar.tsx`\n- `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts`\n- `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts`\n- `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/[id]/ListingDetail.tsx`\n- `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/profile/page.tsx`\n- `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/db.ts`"},{"type":"text","text":"agentId: a1f5e46afabb2fbba (use SendMessage with to: 'a1f5e46afabb2fbba' to continue this agent)\n<usage>total_tokens: 51320\ntool_uses: 33\nduration_ms: 116236</usage>"}]}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"56b902f7-a667-4b55-8104-777174b59df9","uuid":"e7930eea-b711-4a45-ac49-b2fb8f823f1c","timestamp":"2026-03-20T18:03:04.288Z","tool_use_result":{"status":"completed","prompt":"Analyze the Bookmate codebase at /root/Projects/bookmate/app to find potential improvements. Focus on:\n\n1. UX issues - missing loading states, error handling gaps, accessibility problems\n2. Performance issues - N+1 queries, missing indexes, slow API calls\n3. Security gaps - any remaining input validation issues, CSRF, XSS\n4. Missing functionality that would improve the core experience (not new features, but polish)\n\nLook at:\n- app/app/ directory (pages and API routes)\n- app/components/ directory\n- app/lib/ directory (db, session, notifications)\n\nGive me a prioritized list of the top 5 improvements worth making, with specific file references and what needs to change.","agentId":"a1f5e46afabb2fbba","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Here is the full analysis.\n\n---\n\n## Prioritized Top 5 Improvements\n\n---\n\n### 1. The `GET /api/notifications` call can be deferred to when the user actually opens the notifications page.\n\n**Files to touch:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/me/route.ts`, `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/Navbar.tsx`\n\n---\n\n### 3. `notifyGroupFull` Issues N+1 DB Queries and Email Calls (Performance + Reliability)\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts`, lines 109-132\n\n`notifyGroupFull` fetches all members of a listing and then calls `createNotification()` for each member in a `for` loop. Inside `createNotification`, there is another `getUserEmail()` query per user (line 5-9), followed by a fire-and-forget `sendEmail`. Listing Detail Page Has No Error State for Failed Fetch + `fetchListing` Has No Error Handling (UX - Medium Priority)\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/[id]/ListingDetail.tsx`, lines 81-92\n\nThe `fetchListing` function does not have a `try/catch`. If the network request fails (not a 404, but an actual error), `setLoading(false)` is never called - the component stays in the loading spinner forever with no feedback. Two high-frequency query patterns are not indexed:\n\n- `listing_applications` is queried by `(listing_id, status)` in three places: `[id]/route.ts` (pending applicants panel), `[id]/applications/route.ts` (approve/reject loop), and `[id]/apply/route.ts`. is_read);\n```\n\nThese are low-risk, additive changes using the existing `CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS` pattern already in the file.\n\n---\n\n### Summary Table\n\n| Priority | Issue | Category | Files {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01RrsEn7kKUayNJSHgLx2Ck7","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01SbcSRB4Wr61dLJYUfF3ctw","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh issue create --title \"Hardening: rate limiting, navbar perf, error handling, DB indexes\" --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Summary\n\nCode review identified several hardening improvements for the shipped product:\n\n1. **Rate limiting on auth endpoints** (Security) — No brute-force protection on login/register. Add in-memory rate limiting (5 attempts/15min window, return 429).\n2. **Navbar double-fetch optimization** (Performance) — Merge unread notification count into `/api/auth/me` to collapse 2 network requests into 1 on every page load.\n3. **Missing error handling in client fetches** (UX) — `ListingDetail` and `profile/page.tsx` have no try/catch on fetch calls; failures leave the page in infinite loading spinner.\n4. **Missing DB indexes** (Performance) — Add indexes on `listing_applications(listing_id, status)` and `notifications(user_id, is_read)` for common query patterns.\n\n## Priority\nP1 — Important quality improvements, not blocking but should ship soon.\nEOF\n)\" --label \"approved,P1\" --project \"Bookmate\"","description":"Create issue for improvements"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":510,"cache_read_input_tokens":41189,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":510},"output_tokens":24,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"56b902f7-a667-4b55-8104-777174b59df9","uuid":"3d33dc2a-f63d-42e7-accc-46abee18f769"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01U9AcuFmm7c4k6yk7GFVwBR","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     7→  try {\n     8→    const { email, password } = await req.json();\n     9→\n    10→    if (!email || !password) {\n    11→      return NextResponse.json(\n    12→        { error: \"Email and password are required\" },\n    13→        { status: 400 }\n    14→      );\n    15→    }\n    16→\n    17→    const user = db\n    18→      .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, password_hash, display_name FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    19→      .get(email.toLowerCase().trim()) as\n    20→      | { id: number; email: string; password_hash: string; display_name: string }\n    21→      | undefined;\n    22→\n    23→    if (!user) {\n    24→      return NextResponse.json(\n    25→        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n    26→        { status: 401 }\n    27→      );\n    28→    }\n    29→\n    30→    const valid = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password_hash);\n    31→    if (!valid) {\n    32→      return NextResponse.json(\n    33→        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n    34→        { status: 401 }\n    35→      );\n    36→    }\n    37→\n    38→    const session = await getSession();\n    39→    session.userId = user.id;\n    40→    session.email = user.email;\n    41→    session.displayName = user.display_name;\n    42→    await session.save();\n    43→\n    44→    return NextResponse.json({\n    45→      user: {\n    46→        id: user.id,\n    47→        email: user.email,\n    48→        displayName: user.display_name,\n    49→      },\n    50→    });\n    51→  } catch (error) {\n    52→    console.error(\"Login error:\", error);\n    53→    return NextResponse.json(\n    54→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    55→      { status: 500 }\n    56→    );\n    57→  }\n    58→}\n    59→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"56b902f7-a667-4b55-8104-777174b59df9","uuid":"576495f3-5c35-4dd8-915a-49992771a911","timestamp":"2026-03-20T18:03:34.309Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/login/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  try {\n    const { email, password } = await req.json();\n\n    if (!email || !password) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Email and password are required\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    const user = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, password_hash, display_name FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n      .get(email.toLowerCase().trim()) as\n      | { id: number; email: string; password_hash: string; display_name: string }\n      | undefined;\n\n    if (!user) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n        { status: 401 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    const valid = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password_hash);\n    if (!valid) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n        { status: 401 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    const session = await getSession();\n    session.userId = user.id;\n    session.email = user.email;\n    session.displayName = user.display_name;\n    await session.save();\n\n    return NextResponse.json({\n      user: {\n        id: user.id,\n        email: user.email,\n        displayName: user.display_name,\n      },\n    });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Login error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n","numLines":59,"startLine":1,"totalLines":59}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01R5wXtTTmz61yh7nRK8c22L","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     7→  try {\n     8→    const { email, password, displayName } = await req.json();\n     9→\n    10→    if (!email || !password || !displayName) {\n    11→      return NextResponse.json(\n    12→        { error: \"Email, password, and display name are required\" },\n    13→        { status: 400 }\n    14→      );\n    15→    }\n    16→\n    17→    if (password.length < 8) {\n    18→      return NextResponse.json(\n    19→        { error: \"Password must be at least 8 characters\" },\n    20→        { status: 400 }\n    21→      );\n    22→    }\n    23→\n    24→    // bcrypt only uses the first 72 bytes; cap to prevent DoS via slow hashing\n    25→    if (password.length > 72) {\n    26→      return NextResponse.json(\n    27→        { error: \"Password must be at most 72 characters\" },\n    28→        { status: 400 }\n    29→      );\n    30→    }\n    31→\n    32→    if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    33→      return NextResponse.json(\n    34→        { error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" },\n    35→        { status: 400 }\n    36→      );\n    37→    }\n    38→\n    39→    if (email.length > 254) {\n    40→      return NextResponse.json(\n    41→        { error: \"Email address is too long\" },\n    42→        { status: 400 }\n    43→      );\n    44→    }\n    45→\n    46→    // Check if email is already taken\n    47→    const existing = db\n    48→      .prepare(\"SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    49→      .get(email);\n    50→    if (existing) {\n    51→      return NextResponse.json(\n    52→        { error: \"An account with this email already exists\" },\n    53→        { status: 409 }\n    54→      );\n    55→    }\n    56→\n    57→    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 12);\n    58→\n    59→    const result = db\n    60→      .prepare(\n    61→        \"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\"\n    62→      )\n    63→      .run(email.toLowerCase().trim(), passwordHash, displayName.trim());\n    64→\n    65→    // Auto-login after registration\n    66→    const session = await getSession();\n    67→    session.userId = Number(result.lastInsertRowid);\n    68→    session.email = email.toLowerCase().trim();\n    69→    session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    70→    await session.save();\n    71→\n    72→    return NextResponse.json(\n    73→      {\n    74→        user: {\n    75→          id: result.lastInsertRowid,\n    76→          email: email.toLowerCase().trim(),\n    77→          displayName: displayName.trim(),\n    78→        },\n    79→      },\n    80→      { status: 201 }\n    81→    );\n    82→  } catch (error) {\n    83→    console.error(\"Registration error:\", error);\n    84→    return NextResponse.json(\n    85→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    86→      { status: 500 }\n    87→    );\n    88→  }\n    89→}\n    90→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"56b902f7-a667-4b55-8104-777174b59df9","uuid":"892eeb66-408f-48ae-9a4d-f24fd022c9c8","timestamp":"2026-03-20T18:03:34.315Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/register/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  try {\n    const { email, password, displayName } = await req.json();\n\n    if (!email || !password || !displayName) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Email, password, and display name are required\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (password.length < 8) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Password must be at least 8 characters\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    // bcrypt only uses the first 72 bytes; cap to prevent DoS via slow hashing\n    if (password.length > 72) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Password must be at most 72 characters\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (displayName.length > 100) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (email.length > 254) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Email address is too long\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    // Check if email is already taken\n    const existing = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n      .get(email);\n    if (existing) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"An account with this email already exists\" },\n        { status: 409 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 12);\n\n    const result = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\"\n      )\n      .run(email.toLowerCase().trim(), passwordHash, displayName.trim());\n\n    // Auto-login after registration\n    const session = await getSession();\n    session.userId = Number(result.lastInsertRowid);\n    session.email = email.toLowerCase().trim();\n    session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    await session.save();\n\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      {\n        user: {\n          id: result.lastInsertRowid,\n          email: email.toLowerCase().trim(),\n          displayName: displayName.trim(),\n        },\n      },\n      { status: 201 }\n    );\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Registration error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n","numLines":90,"startLine":1,"totalLines":90}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_011J82oCodV8eS1givAWri9A","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function GET() {\n     6→  const session = await getSession();\n     7→\n     8→  if (!session.userId) {\n     9→    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });\n    10→  }\n    11→\n    12→  const user = db\n    13→    .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, display_name, bio FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    14→    .get(session.userId) as\n    15→    | { id: number; email: string; display_name: string; bio: string }\n    16→    | undefined;\n    17→\n    18→  if (!user) {\n    19→    session.destroy();\n    20→    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });\n    21→  }\n    22→\n    23→  return NextResponse.json({\n    24→    user: {\n    25→      id: user.id,\n    26→      email: user.email,\n    27→      displayName: user.display_name,\n    28→      bio: user.bio,\n    29→    },\n    30→  });\n    31→}\n    32→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"56b902f7-a667-4b55-8104-777174b59df9","uuid":"1e09bef6-eaeb-4752-8571-c09d4fc6694a","timestamp":"2026-03-20T18:03:34.717Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/me/route.ts","content":"import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\n\nexport async function GET() {\n  const session = await getSession();\n\n  if (!session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });\n  }\n\n  const user = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, display_name, bio FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(session.userId) as\n    | { id: number; email: string; display_name: string; bio: string }\n    | undefined;\n\n  if (!user) {\n    session.destroy();\n    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    user: {\n      id: user.id,\n      email: user.email,\n      displayName: user.display_name,\n      bio: user.bio,\n    },\n  });\n}\n","numLines":32,"startLine":1,"totalLines":32}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01KbEqZb2Vos4yo3QqJU8msb","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     4→import { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\n     5→import { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n     6→\n     7→interface User {\n     8→  id: number;\n     9→  email: string;\n    10→  displayName: string;\n    11→}\n    12→\n    13→export default function Navbar() {\n    14→  const [user, setUser] = useState<User | null>(null);\n    15→  const [notifCount, setNotifCount] = useState(0);\n    16→  const [menuOpen, setMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n    17→  const router = useRouter();\n    18→\n    19→  useEffect(() => {\n    20→    fetch(\"/api/auth/me\")\n    21→      .then((r) => r.json())\n    22→      .then((data) => {\n    23→        if (data.user) {\n    24→          setUser(data.user);\n    25→          // Fetch notification count\n    26→          fetch(\"/api/notifications\")\n    27→            .then((r) => r.json())\n    28→            .then((n) => setNotifCount(n.unreadCount || 0));\n    29→        }\n    30→      });\n    31→  }, []);\n    32→\n    33→  const handleLogout = async () => {\n    34→    await fetch(\"/api/auth/logout\", { method: \"POST\" });\n    35→    setUser(null);\n    36→    setMenuOpen(false);\n    37→    router.push(\"/\");\n    38→    router.refresh();\n    39→  };\n    40→\n    41→  return (\n    42→    <nav\n    43→      className=\"border-b sticky top-0 z-50\"\n    44→      style={{\n    45→        borderColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n    46→        backgroundColor: \"var(--color-bg)\",\n    47→      }}\n    48→    >\n    49→      <div className=\"max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 h-16 flex items-center justify-between\">\n    50→        <Link\n    51→          href=\"/\"\n    52→          className=\"text-xl font-bold\"\n    53→          style={{ color: \"var(--color-accent)\", letterSpacing: \"-0.03em\" }}\n    54→        >\n    55→          bookmate\n    56→        </Link>\n    57→\n    58→        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-4\">\n    59→          {user ? (\n    60→            <>\n    61→              <Link\n    62→                href=\"/listings/create\"\n    63→                className=\"btn-primary text-sm\"\n    64→                style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\" }}\n    65→              >\n    66→                + New Listing\n    67→              </Link>\n    68→\n    69→              <div className=\"relative\">\n    70→                <button\n    71→                  onClick={() => setMenuOpen(!menuOpen)}\n    72→                  className=\"flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer\"\n    73→                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif\" }}\n    74→                >\n    75→                  <div\n    76→                    className=\"w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"\n    77→                    style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\" }}\n    78→                  >\n    79→                    {user.displayName.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n    80→                  </div>\n    81→                  {notifCount > 0 && (\n    82→                    <span\n    83→                      className=\"badge text-white\"\n    84→                      style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-error)\", fontSize: \"0.65rem\" }}\n    85→                    >\n    86→                      {notifCount}\n    87→                    </span>\n    88→                  )}\n    89→                </button>\n    90→\n    91→                {menuOpen && (\n    92→                  <div\n    93→
